subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen calleth unto all who dwell on earth and in heaven: Worship none save God, the Almighty, the Most High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ینادی قلم الاعلی من فی الارض و السما ان لاتعبدوا الا الله المقتدر العلی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital, @power of the Manifestation of God
